author: Richard Dewick - makakman
body: I hear you brother, I can't wait! I tried to get tickets to their gig at Brixton Academy later in the year but it was sold out within hours. I'm breaking out the old albums that seem timeless to me :o)

author: Matt Burgess
body: Ah man, pity you couldn't get tickets to the Brixton Academy gig mate… but I'm super stoked to hear that it sold out so quickly, that's a really great sign! :)

author: melaniepainter
body: Brilliant! What a statement, what a girl, what a band. I am SO excited they're back.

author: Matt Burgess
body: You and me both Melanie… you and me both. If that statement by Skin doesn't get you all riled up, then I don't know what will.

author: virusvaleria
body: i was 17 y.o. and their first album was just brilliant. they were the reason why i used to watch MTV for hours: just to catch a video of them (Weak? YEAH! but Hedonism? OMG!)
